title: Export default fields
description:
We’ve made exporting your data even easier by making improvements to Jira’s CSV export functionality. This streamlines the process of exporting work items by using your preferred settings. To use your default fields with a saved filter: Select a saved filter in All work view, or select a saved filter under Filters in the sidebar.
	Select More actions (…) menu at the top-right.
	Choose Export.
	Select Export CSV (my defaults) or Export Excel CSV (my defaults).
